meta.title: Google Veo 3.1 Deep Dive -  Does it Beat Sora 2?
meta.description:
Google Veo 3.1 vs Sora 2, which AI video generator is better?
Try Veo 3.1 & Sora 2 on OpenArt 👉 https://openart.ai/home/?ref=veo3vsSora2

In this tutorial I walk you through different ways of how you can use Google Veo 3.1. We will test out the ingredients feature and I will walk you through how to use the start and end frame on veo 3.1 Lastly we will compare it to sora 2 to see which model you should use for your generations. 

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
